title: TFC Metallum U
description: Add new Metals, Tools and Ores to Terrafirmacraft.
body:
TFC Metallum U add new Metals, Tools and Ores to Terrafirmacraft.

The goal is to register metals and ores used by other mods for seamless integration with TFC.

TFC Metallum U is a rewrite of TFC Metallum for 1.12.2 which you can find [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-metallum)

TFC Metallum U add the following ores : 
- Bauxite
- Certus Quartz
- Cobaltite
- Monazite
- Native Iridium
- Native Osmium
- Native Platinum
- Rutile
- Stibnite
- Uraninite
- wolframite

TFC Metallum U add the following metals :
- Alnico
- Aluminium
- Aluminium Brass
- Antimony
- Mithril
- Osmium
- Cobalt
- Ardite
- Constantan
- Electrum
- Invar
- Red Alloy
- Titanium
- Tungsten
- Tungstensteel
- Boron
- Thorium
- Lithium
- Manganese
- Magnesium
- Beryllium
- Zirconium
- Uranium
- Tough
- Magnesium Diboride
- HSLA Steel
- Zircaloy
- Beryllium Copper
- Ferroboron

Thanks to Therighthon from TFC Discord for the Small Ores(Groundcover).
